// Things I've made

Design & production

From strategy to final asset — a selection of work I've designed, built, and shipped across content, web, and paid campaigns.

01 — Content

Content that educates,
converts, and builds trust

Good content doesn't just fill a page — it earns attention. I create content that's rooted in audience insight and tied to a clear business objective, whether that's building pipeline, enabling sales, or establishing authority.

  • Case studies and blog articles for Preeto, written to drive organic reach and support the sales conversation
  • End-to-end webinar execution — from topic development and speaker prep to live hosting and post-event follow-up
  • Video scripts, product explainers, and social content built to convert at every stage of the funnel
📄 Preeto Resources 🎥 Vimeo ▶️ YouTube
02 — Web

Pages that work as hard
as the campaigns behind them

A campaign is only as strong as its landing page. I design and build web experiences that are fast to launch, easy to test, and optimised to convert — from full websites to single-purpose validation pages.

  • Built Preeto's website from the ground up — information architecture, copywriting, design, and full analytics tracking via GA4 and GTM
  • Rapid-launch landing pages for client validation sprints, each designed around a single hypothesis with clear signal metrics
  • Designed and manages Creations Hairshop's website — handling content, performance, and ongoing updates
🌐 pree.to ✏️ creationshair.dk
03 — Paid

Ads built on hypotheses,
not guesswork

I don't run ads to spend budget — I run them to learn something. Every campaign starts with a clear hypothesis about who we're reaching and what message should land. Creative follows strategy, not the other way around.

  • End-to-end paid campaign ownership at Preeto — strategy, audience targeting, copy, and multi-format creative production across LinkedIn and Meta
  • Assumption-based ad creative for client market validation projects, designed to generate real signal before committing full budgets
  • A/B and multivariate testing across ad variants to identify the highest-performing message and format — findings fed back into brand strategy
👥 LinkedIn
// What I bring

Skills & competencies

📣
Campaign management
End-to-end integrated campaign delivery across paid, email, social, search, display, and webinars: briefs, calendars, multi-channel orchestration, KPI tracking.
📊
Experimentation & analytics
A/B and multivariate testing, GA4, GTM, Hotjar, SEO/SEM, campaign performance reporting and optimisation.
🚀
Go-to-market strategy
Pretotyping and market validation across insurance, finance, FMCG, and health. Building mock brands to test product-market fit assumptions without brand bias.
✏️
Brand & content
Tone-of-voice governance, campaign narratives, value proposition testing across multi-format assets: ads, landing pages, emails, one-pagers, case studies, decks, video scripts.
🌐
Website management
I keep content updated, monitor performance through GA4 and Hotjar, and manage on-page SEO to make sure the site stays relevant, discoverable, and aligned with what the business needs right now.
🎨
Design & production
Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, Canva. Multi-format asset production — web, social, email, decks — built to convert and stay on-brand.
// About me

The full picture

I've spent the last several years at Preeto as a Digital Marketing & Campaign Manager, owning integrated B2B campaigns end-to-end — strategy, audience targeting, channel mix, and measurement — for clients across insurance, finance, FMCG, and health.

A big part of my role is building mock brands from scratch for client pretotyping projects, developing names, identities, and messaging independently of the client's existing brand so we can test product-market fit without bias.

One thing that sets me apart is how I pair structured planning with hands-on creative production — and increasingly, AI. I use Claude, Viktor, and Twain daily to accelerate content production and messaging testing, while keeping editorial judgment in the loop to protect brand consistency.

I studied International Sales & Marketing at University College of Northern Denmark, and before that, business management in Singapore. I'm naturally curious, love a good experiment, and always up for a challenge.
